title: ostree: use both image and & storage buildtags
body:
The PR #700 replaced ostree buildtag with containers_image_ostree.
    However specifying the ostree buildtag is needed by containers/storage
    vfs driver.
    
/cc @mtrmac @vrothberg

comments.body:
Thanks, this is clearly an improvement, merging.

Still, notes to self:
- `DARWIN_BUILD_TAG` in `Makefile` uses a no-longer-valid tag
- The CI does install ostree but apparently it is not detected (neither before nor after this PR)?!

I’ll hopefully look into those momentarily.
